registers.name: CR
registers.description: GTZC1 TZSC control register.
registers.fieldset_description: GTZC1 TZSC control register.

fields.name: LCK
fields.description: lock the configuration of TZSC_SECCFGRx and TZSC_PRIVCFGRx until next reset This bit is cleared by default and once set, it can not be reset until system reset.

registers.name: SECCFGR1
registers.description: GTZC1 TZSC secure configuration register 1.
registers.fieldset_description: GTZC1 TZSC secure configuration register 1.

registers.name: SECCFGR2
registers.description: GTZC1 TZSC secure configuration register 2.
registers.fieldset_description: GTZC1 TZSC secure configuration register 2.

registers.name: SECCFGR3
registers.description: GTZC1 TZSC secure configuration register 3.
registers.fieldset_description: GTZC1 TZSC secure configuration register 3.

fields.name: ADC12SEC
fields.description: secure access mode for ADC1 and ADC2.

registers.name: PRIVCFGR1
registers.description: GTZC1 TZSC privilege configuration register 1.
registers.fieldset_description: GTZC1 TZSC privilege configuration register 1.

registers.name: PRIVCFGR2
registers.description: GTZC1 TZSC privilege configuration register 2.
registers.fieldset_description: GTZC1 TZSC privilege configuration register 2.

registers.name: PRIVCFGR3
registers.description: GTZC1 TZSC privilege configuration register 3.
registers.fieldset_description: GTZC1 TZSC privilege configuration register 3.

fields.name: ADC12PRIV
fields.description: privileged access mode for ADC1 and ADC2.

registers.name: MPCWM1ACFGR
registers.description: GTZC1 TZSC memory 1 sub-region A watermark configuration register.
registers.fieldset_description: GTZC1 TZSC memory 1 sub-region A watermark configuration register.

fields.name: SREN
fields.description: Sub-region z enable Note: External memories that are watermark controlled start fully non-secure/unprivileged at reset when TZEN = 0xC3. When TZEN = 0xB4, external memories start fully secure/fully privileged (inverted reset-value).

fields.name: SRLOCK
fields.description: Sub-region A lock This bit, once set, can be cleared only by a system reset.

fields.name: SEC
fields.description: Secure sub-region A of base region x This bit is taken into account only if SREN is set.

fields.name: PRIV
fields.description: Privileged sub-region A of base region x This bit is taken into account only if SREN is set.

registers.name: MPCWM1AR
registers.description: GTZC1 TZSC memory 1 sub-region A watermark register.
registers.fieldset_description: GTZC1 TZSC memory 1 sub-region A watermark register.

fields.name: SUBA_START
fields.description: Start of sub-region A in region x This field defines the address offset of the sub-region A, to be multiplied by the granularity defined in Table�30, versus the start of the region x. External memories that are watermark controlled, start fully non-secure at reset when TZEN�=�0xC3. When TZEN�=�0xB4, external memories start fully secure (inverted reset value).

fields.name: SUBA_LENGTH
fields.description: Length of sub-region A in region x This field defines the length of the sub-region A, to be multiplied by the granularity defined in Table�30. When SUBA_START + SUBA_LENGTH is higher than the maximum size allowed for the memory, a saturation of SUBA_LENGTH is applied automatically. If SUBA_LENGTH = 0, the sub-region A is disabled.(SREN bit in TZSC_MPCMWxACFGR is cleared).

registers.name: MPCWM1BCFGR
registers.description: GTZC1 TZSC memory 1 sub-region B watermark configuration register.
registers.fieldset_description: GTZC1 TZSC memory 1 sub-region B watermark configuration register.

fields.name: SREN
fields.description: Sub-region B enable Note: External memories that are watermark controlled start fully non-secure/unprivileged at reset when TZEN = 0xC3. When TZEN = 0xB4, external memories start fully secure/fully privileged (inverted reset-value).

fields.name: SRLOCK
fields.description: Sub-region B lock This bit, once set, can be cleared only by a system reset.

fields.name: SEC
fields.description: Secure sub-region B of base region x This bit is taken into account only if SREN is set.

fields.name: PRIV
fields.description: Privileged sub-region B of base region x This bit is taken into account only if SREN is set.

registers.description: GTZC1 TZSC memory 1 sub-region B watermark register.

fields.name: SUBB_START
fields.description: Start of sub-region B in region x This field defines the address offset of the sub-region B, to be multiplied by the granularity defined in Table�30, versus the start of the region x. External memories that are watermark controlled, start fully non-secure at reset when TZEN�=�0xC3. When TZEN�=�0xB4, external memories start fully secure (inverted reset value).

fields.name: SUBB_LENGTH
fields.description: Length of sub-region B in region x This field defines the length of the sub-region B, to be multiplied by the granularity defined in Table�30. When SUBB_START + SUBB_LENGTH is higher than the maximum size allowed for the memory, a saturation of SUBB_LENGTH is applied automatically. If SUBB_LENGTH = 0, the sub-region B is disabled.(SREN bit in TZSC_MPCMWxBCFGR is cleared).
